## Summary / 摘要

Describe the problem and the focused change. / 说明问题和本次聚焦修改。

## Safety Impact / 安全影响

Describe effects on credentials, external commands, fallback, concurrency, timeouts, and publication safety. / 说明对凭据、外部命令、回退、并发、超时和发布安全的影响。

## Verification / 验证

List commands and results. / 列出验证命令与结果。

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] The change is focused and does not refactor unrelated code. / 修改范围聚焦，未重构无关代码。
- [ ] Relevant offline tests pass. / 相关离线测试通过。
- [ ] User-facing documentation is complete in Chinese and English. / 面向用户的文档包含完整中英文内容。
- [ ] No credentials, personal paths, private logs, or generated run artifacts are included. / 未包含凭据、个人路径、私人日志或生成的运行产物。
- [ ] Licensing and attribution requirements have been reviewed. / 已检查许可证和署名要求。
